test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_bf_lc_low (`id` int, `ary` Array(LowCardinality(String)), INDEX idx_ary ary TYPE bloom_filter(0.01) GRANULARITY 1) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id
CREATE TABLE test_bf_lc_high (`id` int, `ary` Array(LowCardinality(String)), INDEX idx_ary ary TYPE bloom_filter(0.01) GRANULARITY 1) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id
test.query: INSERT INTO test_bf_lc_low SELECT number AS id, [CAST(id % 200, 'String'), CAST((id + 1) % 200, 'String'), CAST((id + 2) % 200, 'String')] FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO test_bf_lc_high SELECT number AS id, [CAST(id, 'String'), CAST(id + 1, 'String'), CAST(id + 2, 'String')] FROM numbers(2000000)
